text: The secretary told me that Mr. Harmsworth would see me.
zh: 秘书告诉我哈姆斯沃思先生要见我。

text: I felt very nervous when I went into his office.
zh: 我走进他办公室时感到非常紧张。

text: He did not look up from his desk when I entered.
zh: 我进去的时候,他连头都没从桌上抬起来。

text: he said that business was very bad.
He told me that the firm could not afford to pay such large salaries.
zh: 他告诉我公司付不起这么高的薪水了。
已经有二十个人离开了。

text: I knew that my turn had come.
'Mr. Harmsworth,' I said in a weak voice.
zh: '哈姆斯沃思先生,'我用微弱的声音说道。

text: Then he smiled and told me I would receive an extra thousand pounds a year!
zh: 接着他笑了笑,告诉我我每年将多拿一千英镑!
